Module com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6
Package com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller

Class SudokuController

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
All Implemented Interfaces:
EscuchadorCambioCelda, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class SudokuController extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable, EscuchadorCambioCelda
Controller for the main Sudoku view.

This class connects the JavaFX view (defined in sudoku-view.fxml) with the model layer (TableroSudoku). It is responsible for:

  • Populating the 6x6 grid with editable text fields.
  • Reacting to user interaction (mouse and keyboard).
  • Generating new puzzles when the user requests them.
  • Keeping a bidirectional mapping between every UI cell and the underlying model cell.

The mapping between visual fields and model cells is stored in a Map, which provides constant-time lookups in both directions and demonstrates the use of advanced data structures beyond plain arrays.

  • Constructor Details

    • SudokuController

      public SudokuController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL ubicacion, ResourceBundle recursos)
      Initialization callback. Sets up the board, wires the buttons and starts a new game automatically.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      ubicacion - FXML location (unused)
      recursos - resource bundle (unused)

    • construirCuadricula

      private void construirCuadricula()
      Builds the 6x6 grid of text fields and registers all event handlers on each cell. Also populates the bidirectional mappings between the UI fields and the model cells (which will be filled in later by iniciarNuevoJuego()).

    • crearCampoCelda

      private javafx.scene.control.TextField crearCampoCelda(int fila, int columna)
      Creates a single configured TextField for the cell at the given position. Attaches the appropriate CSS classes (including the block-border classes) and all the event handlers.
      Parameters:
      fila - the row index (0-5)
      columna - the column index (0-5)
      Returns:
      a fully configured text field

    • configurarBotones

      private void configurarBotones()
      Configures the action handlers for the main buttons. Uses lambda expressions for concise event handling.

    • iniciarNuevoJuego

      private void iniciarNuevoJuego()
      Generates a new Sudoku puzzle, refreshes the UI, and resets the validator so that real-time checks operate on the new board.

    • sincronizarMapas

      private void sincronizarMapas()
      Rebuilds the bidirectional mappings between text fields and model cells. Must be called every time a new board is generated.

    • refrescarCuadricula

      private void refrescarCuadricula()
      Updates the visual state of every cell to reflect the current state of the model. Fixed cells are shown highlighted and non-editable; empty cells are cleared; cells with values display them.

    • actualizarEstado

      private void actualizarEstado(String mensaje)
      Updates the status label shown at the bottom of the window.
      Parameters:
      mensaje - the message to display

    • manejarClickCelda

      private void manejarClickCelda(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent evento, int fila, int columna)
      Handles a mouse click on a cell. Currently it only updates the status label; full selection logic will arrive in later phases.
      Parameters:
      evento - the mouse event that triggered the call
      fila - the row of the clicked cell
      columna - the column of the clicked cell

    • manejarSolicitudAyuda

      private void manejarSolicitudAyuda()
      Requests a hint from the ProveedorAyuda, applies it to the model and highlights it visually in the UI. If no hint can be generated (because the board is full or no legal candidate exists) the user is notified through the status label.

    • procesarEntradaUsuario

      private void procesarEntradaUsuario(int fila, int columna, String texto)
      Reads the current text of a field and updates the underlying model cell accordingly. Empty fields clear the cell value.
      Parameters:
      fila - the row of the cell being updated
      columna - the column of the cell being updated
      texto - the current text in the field

    • alCambiarCelda

      public void alCambiarCelda(int fila, int columna, int nuevoValor)
      Invoked when a cell's value changes due to user input.

      Triggers real-time validation of the entire board after any cell change. Updates the visual error state of every cell and notifies the player through the status label. If the board is fully and correctly completed, displays a victory message.

      Specified by:
      alCambiarCelda in interface EscuchadorCambioCelda
      Parameters:
      fila - the row index of the modified cell (0-5)
      columna - the column index of the modified cell (0-5)
      nuevoValor - the new value placed in the cell, or 0 if cleared

    • esBordeDerechoBloque

      private boolean esBordeDerechoBloque(int columna)
      Determines whether the given column index lies on the right edge of a 2x3 block, which should be visually marked with a thicker border.
      Parameters:
      columna - the column index
      Returns:
      true if the column needs a thick right border

    • esBordeInferiorBloque

      private boolean esBordeInferiorBloque(int fila)
      Determines whether the given row index lies on the bottom edge of a 2x3 block, which should be visually marked with a thicker border.
      Parameters:
      fila - the row index
      Returns:
      true if the row needs a thick bottom border

    • refrescarErroresVisuales

      private void refrescarErroresVisuales()
      Updates the visual error state of every cell in the board by delegating to the FabricaEstilos. Cells whose model marks them as having an error get the error style applied; all others have it removed.

    • verificarVictoria

      private boolean verificarVictoria()
      Checks whether the board is fully completed without any rule violation. When the game has been solved, displays a congratulatory message and disables further editing.
      Returns:
      true if the game has just been won, false otherwise

    • bloquearTablero

      private void bloquearTablero()
      Disables editing on every non-fixed cell. Used once the player has solved the puzzle to prevent further modifications.

    • aplicarEstadoExito

      private void aplicarEstadoExito(String mensaje)
      Updates the status label with a success message and applies the success style through the FabricaEstilos.
      Parameters:
      mensaje - the message to display

    • aplicarEstadoError

      private void aplicarEstadoError(String mensaje)
      Updates the status label with an error message and applies the error style through the FabricaEstilos.
      Parameters:
      mensaje - the message to display

    • destacarSugerencia

      private void destacarSugerencia(javafx.scene.control.TextField campo)
      Highlights a cell briefly to indicate it has been filled by the hint feature. The highlight is removed automatically after a short delay so it does not interfere with normal play. Delegates the actual style manipulation to FabricaEstilos.
      Parameters:
      campo - the text field to highlight

    • desbloquearTablero

      private void desbloquearTablero()
      Re-enables editing on every non-fixed cell. Used after a victory when the player starts a new game.

    • manejarNavegacionTeclado

      private void manejarNavegacionTeclado(javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent evento, int fila, int columna)
      Handles keyboard navigation across cells of the Sudoku board.

      When the user presses one of the arrow keys, the focus is moved to the next editable (non-fixed) cell in the corresponding direction. Fixed cells are automatically skipped because the player cannot type into them. Navigation wraps inside the board boundaries: if there is no editable cell in the requested direction, focus stays on the current cell.

      Parameters:
      evento - the key press event triggered by the user
      fila - the row of the cell that currently has focus
      columna - the column of the cell that currently has focus

    • buscarCampoNavegable

      private javafx.scene.control.TextField buscarCampoNavegable(int filaInicial, int columnaInicial, int deltaFila, int deltaColumna)
      Searches for the next editable (non-fixed) cell starting from the given coordinates and advancing in the direction indicated by the deltas. Returns null if no editable cell is found before reaching the edge of the board.
      Parameters:
      filaInicial - the starting row index
      columnaInicial - the starting column index
      deltaFila - vertical step (-1, 0 or 1)
      deltaColumna - horizontal step (-1, 0 or 1)
      Returns:
      the next editable text field, or null if none exists
